chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 195 - عن محمد بن مسلم عن أحدهما عليهما السلام قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم: ليس بمؤمن من لم يأمن جاره بوائقه. قيل: يا رسول الله، وما بوائقه؟ قال: غشمه وأضله و أضله وغشمه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 195. It has been reported that Muhammad ibn Muslim said that one of the two (al-Baqir or al-Sadiq (a.s)) said: the Messenger of Allah (a.s) said: He is not a believer from whose actions his neighbor is not safe. 'O Allah's Messenger,' they asked, 'What are these?' 'These are the acts of wronging and oppression,' the Messenger of Allah replied.
